players.name: scwj21
matchupItemFlags: no magic resist vs a 3-magical enemy comp

flags: our damage is 4/5 magical — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of it

notes: Their main damage was Shinbi (10k magical); 1/5 of us itemized magic resist — that hurt.
Enemy ran 0/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Countess Feast (suppress 0.75s). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Our damage is 4/5 magical — predictable; one magic-resist item answers most of it. Mix in a physical threat.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
ourKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
ourKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
ourKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
ourKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

ourKits.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
ourKits.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
ourKits.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
ourKits.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
ourKits.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

ourKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
ourKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
ourKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

enemyKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
enemyKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over the per-event objective+tower stream; itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
